playbook.intent: From the initial trigger to the closed outcome described in scope, deliver every artefact named in success_criteria without skipping the decision gates between stages.
playbook.scope: Vendor takes a multi-month migration: monolith to services, on-prem to cloud, or legacy st ack (Struts / classic ASP / PHP4 / .NET Framework) to a current one. By project close: tar get system is live in production, traffic cut over with rollback proven, legacy decommissi on plan signed, performance and cost SLAs met. AI coding agent is used heavily but never t rusted blind.

success-criteria.criterion: Every stage's decision gate is recorded as passed before the next stage starts.
All artefacts named in the stage outputs are produced and signed off.
A written close-out record exists for archival and post-mortem.

stage.name: Scope
stage.intent: Define the scope, exit criteria, and the people who must agree on success.

tasks.task: Restate the scope outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the scope output and who must approve it.
Produce the scope artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the scope step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the scope artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.intent: Gather evidence about the current state, stakeholders, constraints, and prior data.

tasks.task: Restate the discovery outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the discovery output and who must approve it.
Produce the discovery artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the discovery step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the discovery artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Turn discovery output into a written plan with owners, sequence, and risk reserves.

tasks.task: Restate the plan outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the plan output and who must approve it.
Produce the plan artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the plan step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the plan artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Execute
stage.intent: Run the plan in order of dependency; ship each output before moving on.

tasks.task: Restate the execute outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the execute output and who must approve it.
Produce the execute artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the execute step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the execute artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Verify
stage.intent: Check the work against the exit criteria with the people who signed off in Scope.

tasks.task: Restate the verify outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the verify output and who must approve it.
Produce the verify artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the verify step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the verify artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Communicate
stage.intent: Tell every stakeholder what changed, what's next, and what they own.

tasks.task: Restate the communicate outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the communicate output and who must approve it.
Produce the communicate artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the communicate step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the communicate artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.

stage.name: Close
stage.intent: Capture lessons, archive the artefacts, and trigger the next-step pipeline.

tasks.task: Restate the close outcome for this engagement in one sentence.
Identify who owns the close output and who must approve it.
Produce the close artefact in the agreed format.

outputs.output: Updated decision log entry for the close step

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the next stage when the close artefact is approved by the named owner; iterate if any blocker remains.
